title: VO2max Surge on Threshold
description: VO2max intervals layered over FTP base
purpose: VO2 intervals with high lactate baseline

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 0% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. 70% for 13:18. This is the foundation of all fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the base. 13:18 at 70%. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: where excitement goes to retire. 13:18 of controlled boredom.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Starting threshold work. 95% for 25:54. This should hurt just enough.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 1: 95% FTP for 25:54. 85-100 rpm, Seated. This should feel 'comfortably hard.'
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Block 1/1. 25:54 at 95%. You're building the engine that wins races.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 1/1. 25:54 in the space between 'fine' and 'please make it stop.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 1: 95% FTP, 85-100 rpm, Seated. Find your rhythm. Don't overcook the start.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 54% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Current: 120% FTP × 2:48. After rest, expect 95% for 13min. Plan accordingly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 54% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 54% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 54% done. 120% for 2:48. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 58% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 16 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 42 minutes in. 95% at 85-100 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 58% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 1 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 58% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 58% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 95%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First interval at 120%. Set the tone. Your body remembers the last time you quit early.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 2:48 at 120%. Then 13min cooldown. Empty the tank correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last one. Everything you have. Then you're done and you'll be stronger for it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Last one. 2:48 at 120%. Then 13 minutes to contemplate your life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last rep. 120-120% FTP, 85-100 rpm, Seated. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 81% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 81% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-100 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 81% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 58 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 13:18. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.
